product_overview: MedhaX is a real-time multiplayer coding quiz game backend that supports authentication, social/friendship management, match history retrieval, and live gameplay synchronization. It exposes REST APIs for user and relationship management and uses Socket.io for real-time multiplayer interactions.
core_goals: Provide secure user registration, login, and authenticated profile access via JWT
Enable social discovery and friendship workflows for multiplayer engagement
Allow users to retrieve historical match records and performance data
Support real-time lobby, matchmaking, and gameplay coordination over WebSockets

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can create accounts, sign in, and verify their authenticated profile using JWT-based authentication.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/signup with valid email, password, and username -> Receive 201 with user profile and JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with the token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user profile
POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with user profile and JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with the token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user profile
POST /api/auth/signup with missing or invalid fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request
GET /api/auth/me without a JWT token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Social & Friendship
features.description: Users can search for other registered users, view friendship status, send requests, respond to requests, and inspect online presence.
user_flows: GET /api/users/search with a valid username query and JWT token -> Receive 200 with matching registered users -> POST /api/friends/request with a target user_id -> Receive 200 with success message -> GET /api/friends with the token -> Receive 200 with accepted friends and active requests
GET /api/friends with a valid JWT token -> Receive 200 with list of friendships and pending requests
POST /api/friends/respond with friendship_id and status=accept -> Receive 200 with success message
POST /api/friends/respond with friendship_id and status=decline -> Receive 200 with success message
GET /api/users/online with a valid JWT token -> Receive 200 with list of online users
POST /api/friends/respond with an invalid friendship_id or unauthorized token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Match History
features.description: Users can retrieve their past match records to review gameplay history and related stats.
user_flows: GET /api/matches/history with a valid JWT token -> Receive 200 with list of historical matches
GET /api/matches/history without a JWT token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Live Gameplay
features.description: Players join rooms, synchronize lobby settings, ready up, receive questions, submit answers, and track scores in real time through Socket.io.
user_flows: Socket.io connect with a valid authenticated user token -> Join lobby room -> Receive room configuration and matchmaking updates -> Mark player ready -> Receive real-time question dispatch -> Submit answer -> Receive answer evaluation and updated score
Socket.io connect with a valid authenticated user token -> Join grid-based gameplay room -> Send coordinate-based dig action -> Receive hit/miss indicator -> Receive live score update
Socket.io connect without a valid authentication token -> Connection rejected or unauthorized event returned
Socket.io connect to a match room after the match has started or ended -> Receive room denial or synchronization failure event

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: User sign-up, sign-in, and profile validation using JWT tokens.

features.name: Social & Friendship API
features.description: Add friends, accept/decline friend requests, list friends, and search all users.

endpoints.description: Send a friend request to another user
Accept or decline a pending friend request
Retrieve a list of accepted friends and active requests

features.name: Match History API
features.description: Query historical matches played by the user.

endpoints.description: Fetch past matches for a specific user
